*** 4 INJ *** EF-1 TORNADO DAMAGE WAS FOUND ALONG COUNTY ROAD 1175 WITH TREES SNAPPED AND UPROOTED ALONG A PATH PARALLEL TO THE ROAD. NEAR THE END OF THE PATH, THE TORNADO DESTROYED A DOUBLE-WIDE TRAILER HOME AND PUSHED IT INTO A WOODED AREA. FOUR OCCUPANTS IN THE HOME WERE INJURED.
*** 3 INJ *** 3 INJURED WITH A TORNADO BADLY DAMAGING HOME IN RATCLIFF. TIME ESTIMATED.
*** 3 INJ *** 3 INJURED WITH A TORNADO BADLY DAMAGING RATCLIFF. TIME ESTIMATED.
POWERLINES DOWN NEAR RATCLIFF.

EF-2 TORNADO PRODUCED INTERMITTENT DAMAGE ALONG ITS TRACK TAKING A METAL ROOF OFF OF A HOME WHERE IT TOUCHED DOWN. THE MOST SEVERE DAMAGE WAS ON THE NORTHEAST END OF THE TRACK WHERE TREES WERE STRIPPED OF LIMBS, VEHICLES WERE TOSSED AND STACKED ON ONE ANOTHER AND A DOUBLE-WIDE TRAILER HOME WAS DESTROYED.
TREES AND POWERLINES DOWN ON FM 3151 WEST-NORTHWEST OF IME ESTIMATED.
TREES AND POWERLINES DOWN ON FM 3151 WEST-NORTHWEST OF LOVELADY. TIME ESTIMATED.
LARGE TREE LIMB DOWN.
TREES SNAPPED.

*** 1 FATAL *** EF-3 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN HOUSTON COUNTY NORTHEAST OF CROCKETT AND TRACKED FOR 30 MILES ACROSS THE COUNTY LINE THROUGH CHEROKEE COUNTY. THE HOUSTON COUNTY PORTION OF THE PATH WAS 14 MILES. MOST OF THE DAMAGE WAS SNAPPED PINES THAT INDICATES EF-1 DAMAGE BUT MUCH MORE SEVERE DAMAGE WAS FOUND IN AN AREA JUST NORTHEAST OF WECHES WHERE A DOUBLE-WIDE TRAILER AND ITS FRAME WERE THROWN OVER 150 YARDS AND DESTROYED. A FEMALE OCCUPANT WITHIN THE TRAILER WAS KILLED.

*** 1 FATAL *** HSCO DEPUTIES INITIATED A WATER RESCUE FOR A SUBMERGED VAN IN FLOODWATERS AT HWY 59 AND WILL CLAYTON PKWY. THREE OCCUPANTS WERE EXTRACTED. ONE MALE WAS TRANSPORTED IN CRITICAL CONDITION TO A HOSPITAL WHERE HE WAS PRONOUNCED DEAD. A SEARCH FOR ADDITIONAL OCCUPANTS REMAINS UNDERWAY AS OF 711 PM CDT.
